titleStmt.title: SII 38.132: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 132. (A.R. No. 132 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west and south base of the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājādhirāja I Regnal year: 31: 1049 A.D.

summary.p: The first thirty-four lines which contain the first transaction is published in S.I.I. Vol. IV. No. 555.
Begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Tiṅgaḷer taru.

This record contains three transactions involving a lady called Nāgalavvaichchāni, the wife of Prabhākara Bhaṭṭaṉ of Mēgalāpuram of Āryadēśam. She is described as one who was rendering services (tiruppaṇi) to the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple.

The first one was between the above lady and the two sabhās of Sundarachōḻachaturvedimaṅgalam and Vāṉavaṉmādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. These assemblies sold five vēlis of land freed from taxes such as chilliṟai, śōṟuveṭṭi, veṭṭi, and amañji on the tillers of this land. The land was donated for the maintenance of the maṭha called Rājēndrasōḻan-maḍam, situated within the temple which was constructed by her and to feed the devotees there. The two assemblies sold this land after receiving the price-money in full from the lady. The officials of the sabhā figure as signatories to this transaction.

In the second transaction the ūrār of Eṇṇūr in Nāvalūr-nāḍu in Puḻar-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam sold 2 paṭṭi or 2000 kuḻi of land after receiving the money from the same donor. The land was also exempted from taxes and it was sold for the maintenance of the same maṭha (maṭhapuram), Rājēndrachōḻaṉ-maḍam constructed by the same donor.

The third transaction dated in the twenty seventh regnal year (1045 A.D.) of the king, refers to the sale of land by the nagarattār of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr (in Puḻal-nāḍu in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam) to the lady. The land was also freed from taxes. The lady in turn endowed the land probably for feeding the māhēśvaras, who came to witness the festivals of the God Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyār during the months of Māśi (February-March) and Paṅguni (March-April), in the Rājēndrachōḻaṉ-maṭha. The third transaction which was obviously effected earlier in the 27th year was commited to writing much later i.e, after four years, as it is at the end of this long document.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer tarutaṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅko
llocci karuṅkali kaṭintu taṉ ciṟu tātaiyaiyum tiruttamaiyaṉaiyuṅ kuṟikkoḷ taṉ Iḷaṅkokkaḷaiyum neṟiyuṇar taṉ tiruppu
talvaraiyum tuṉṟeḻil vānavaṉ vallavaṉ kaṅkaṉ pulaṅkeḻiṟp pallavaṉ Ilaṅkaiyark kiṟaivaṉ kaṉṉakucciyar kāva
laneṉap poṉnaṇic cuṭaraṇi makuṭañ cūṭṭi paṭarp pukaḻāṅkavark kavar nāṭaruḷip pāṅkuṟa maṉnu pallūḻiyuṭṭeṉṉavar mu
varuḷ māṉāparaṇāṉ poṉ muṭiyaāṉāp parumatiṭp pacun=talai porukaḷat tarintu vāraḷaviya kaḻal virakeraḷaiṉai muṉai (ṉa)
vayiṟpiṭittuk kaṉantivāraṇattanattivāraṇa is the correct reading. (kka)k kaḷiṟṟiṉālutaippittaruḷi An=tamil perumpukaḻc cun=tarapāṇṭiyaṉ Oṟṟai ve
ṇkuṭaiyum kaṟṟai veṇ kavariyum ciṅkātanamum veṅkaḷat tiḻantu taṉmuṭi viḻat talaivirit taṭitaḷan=toṭat tollai mullaiyūrt turattiyo
l kalil veṇṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭṭotukki mevu pukaḻi rāmakuṭa munintu viṭar keḻu villavaṉ kuṭar maṭikkoṇṭu taṉnāṭu viṭṭoṭi pukkoḷippa
vañciyam putumalar malai toṅkeñcalil velaikeḻu kāntaḷurccālai(k) kalamaṟuppittākuvamallaṉu mañca kevutaṟ ṟāṅ karumpaṭaiyā lā
karumuraṭc cāṅkamaiyyaṉu mutalinar camarapiru vottu
ṭaiya nimir cuṭarp poṉṉoṭayṅka(e)rip puraviyoṭum piṭi
ttut taṉnāṭaiyiṟ cayaṅkoṇṭu Oṉnār koḷḷippāk
kai yuḷḷeri maṭuppit toru tanit tāṇṭāṟp porukaṭalilaṅ
kaiyar komāṉ vikkiramapākuviṉ makiṭamum muṉṟanak kuṭain=ta teṉ
ṟamiḻmaṇṭala muḻuvatu miḻantu Eḻ kaṭaliḻam pukkilaṅkicaṉākiya vi
kkirama pāṇṭiyaṉ parumaṇi makuṭamum kāṇṭaku taṉna tākkit taṉna tākkittaṉ
kaṉnakucciyilum Ākkali yiḻañ ciriteṉṟeṇṇi yuḷaṅkoḷ nāṭu n=taṉ Uṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷaṅki mu(ṭ)ṭi kavitta vitaralāvekaṉRead viracalāmekaṉ porkkaḷattañcik kārkkaḷi ṟiḻantu kavaiyuṟṟoṭik kātaliyoṭum taṉaṟṟuvaiyaip piṭittut tāyai mūkkari
ya Aṅkavamāna niṅkataṟkkāka miṇṭum vantu vāṭṭoḻiluḻntu veṅkaḷattulan=tavakac ciṅkaḷattaraicaṉ poṉnaṇi muṭiyum kaṉnaraṉ vaḻi vanturaikoḷiḻattaraicaṉākiya civallavaṉ matanarācaṉ po(ta)ṉ taṇimuṭiyum koṇṭu
vaṭapulat tirukālāvatum porupaṭai naṭāttik kaṇṭaraṉ tinakaraṉ nāraṇaṉ kaṇavati vaṇṭalar teriyal maticūtaṉneṉ ṟeṉaip palavaraicarai muṉaivaiyiṟṟurat ti vampalar tiru poḻiṟ kampili nakaruḷ cuḷukkiyarRead caḷukkiyarmāḷikai takarppit tiḷakkamil
villavar minavar veḻkulac caḷukkiyar vallavar kaucalar vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cinturar Aiyaṇar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar An=tirar mutalinar Araiciṭu tiṟaikaḷum Āṟiloṉ ṟavaniyil kūṟu koḷ poruḷkaḷum Ukantu nāṉmaṟaiyavar mukantu
koḷak kuṭuttu viśvalokattum viḷaṅki maṉuneṟi niṉṟaśvametañcey taraicu viṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉ Uyarn=taperumpukaḻ kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yā
ṇṭu muppattoṉṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattup puḻalnāṭṭu brahmadeyam cun=taracoḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu vānavaṉmahādeviccaruppetimaṅkalattup
peruṅkuṟimahāsabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇakkaiyeḻuttu Iṉṉāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya mahādevarkkut tiruppaṇi ceytirukkum Āriyatecattu mekaḷāpurattu prabhāgarabhaṭṭaṉ brāhma
ṇi nākalavvaiccāniyāṉa Āriyammai Eṭuppitta rājendracoḻaṉ maṭattukku maṭapuṟamāka I Āriyaammaikaḷ pakkal Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷ koṇṭu viṟṟu koṭutta nilamā
ṭaiya nilam Irumāvum Iṅke muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu nilam Āṟu māvum Iṅke muṉṟāñcatirattu nilam kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Iraṇṭu māvum Iṅke Añcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu nilam Āṟu māvum Āka nilam veli Oṉṟe Oru māvum Iṅke kollai nilam nāṉku māvum Āka nilam Oṉṟe kālum Āka Iṉṉilam Eṟṟi nilam Aiveliyum Itaṉil Uṇṇilam Oḻiyāme(vi)
viṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṉnilattukku paḻampaṭiye niryāyapeṟuvatākavum Iṉnilattu melṉokkiya maramum kiḻṇokkiya kiṇaṟum Iṉ nilattukkurittākavum Irukālāvatu mukkālāvatum peṟu vilaikkāṇam kiḻikaiyil cellakkoṇṭu Iṟaiiḻicci Iṟaiyile viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Iṉnilattukku veṇṭum Iṟai cantrātittavarai nāṅkaḷe Iṟaiyiṟuppatākavum I
ttaṉmattukku Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku sabhai viṟṟuk kuṭukka sabhaiyiṉṟuḷḷiruntu paṇittāṉ vaṭṭamaṇi nārāyaṇakkiramavittaṉ paṇiyālum Irāyūr caṉṉayakkiramavittaṉ paṇiyālum veṟpuṟttut tiruvaiyaṟu toṇavikkiramavittaṉ paṇiyālum Āriyatecattu mekaḷāpurattu prabhāgarabhaṭṭaṉ brāhmaṇi nākavvaiccāṉiyāṉa Āriyaammaikku rājentra
coḻaṉmaṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom śrī māheśvarara Aṟṟaināḷ Amutuceyya viṟṟukkuṭutta Iṉnilattil kuṭi Iruntu Iṉnilam Uḻuṅkuṭikaḷai cilliṟai coṟumāṭṭum veṭṭi Amaiñciyum Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaika(ḷ)ḷum kāṭṭap peṟātomāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Itaṉṟi maṟṟu percilRead māṟṟuvomākil dhanmāsanam Uḷḷiṭṭut tāṉ voṇṭu kovukku nicati kaḻaiñcu
poṉ maṉṟa Oṭṭi Iṭṭuk kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Itikkituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ celavolai yāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟuporuḷ māvaṟutipporuḷ celavolai kāṭṭak kaṭavarallā(yā)tārākavum Ipparicu Icaintu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Eḻutiṉeṉ kumiṇṭili Utaiyātittakkiramavittaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉe
ḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ verpuṟattu Utaiyātittakkiramavittaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ muprayākai karuvaṭikkiramavitta neṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaṭṭamaṇi nārāyaṇak kiramavittaṉ makaṉ somaṉātakkiramavittaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Oṭapuṟatte yātitta(n)kkiramavittaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ verpuṟa
ttut tiruvaiyaṟu tevakkiramavitta(ṉ)neṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Uṭālippaṭṭayak kiṟamavittaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kumiṇṭi caruvaṭikkiramavittaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ verpuṟattu comaṭikkiramavittaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ veṟpuṟattukaṇavatik kiramavittaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaṭṭamaṇi mā(ta)dhavakkiramavittaṉ neṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kumiṇ(ṇ)ṭi toṇayakkiramavitta(ṉ) neṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ veṟpurattu Eṟayak kiramavitta(ṉ)neṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pirāntūrtāḻi kumārakkiramavitta(ṉ)neṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu .
Uṭaiyār śrī rājādhirājadevarkku yāṇṭu muppattoṉṟāvatu jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟ koṭṭattu nāvalūr nāṭṭu Eṇṇūr Ūrom nilavilaiyāvaṇaṅ kaieḻuttu puḻal koṭṭattu puḻalnāṭṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyārkku tiruppaṇi cetirukkum Āriyammai maṭam rājen=tiracoḻaṉ maṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka Āriyadecattu mekaḷāpurattu prabhākarapaṭṭaṉ brāhmaṇi nākalavvaiccāṉiyāṉa Āriyammai pakkal poṉ koṇṭu
Iṟai Iḻicci Iṟaiiliyāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭukkiṉṟa nilamāvatu pāppūṭṭip poṉpaṭukuṭṭattu nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṟa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai muṭikoṇṭāṉvāykkālukku meṟkut teṉpāṟkellai Āṟṟu kāliṟ karaiyum karaipāṭu AkappaThe letter ‘pa’ is written below.ṭa vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai nāṟai kaḻikkāṭu poṉpaṭu kuṭṭattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai piḷḷaiyār naṉtava(ā)ṉattil velikkālukkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṉku Ellai Uḷḷu Akappaṭṭa nilam nan=tavāṉattik kiḻakku muṭikoṇṭāṉ vāykkālukku
kiḻaimaṭam Uṭpaṭa patiṉaṟu cāṇkolāl Āyiraṅ kuḻi koṇṭitu paṭṭi Oṉṟāka Iraṇṭu paṭṭi nilattukkup poṉ koṇṭu Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṟai Iḻicci Iṉṉilattāl van=ta Iṟai Ūrome Iṟuppatāka Iṟai Iḻiccip peṟu vilaikkāṇam kiḻikaiyiṟ cellakkoṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Iṉṉilattukku nirpāyum vāykkālum Iṉṉilattukku Urittāka nīrpāccik koḷḷap peṟuvatākavum Ipparicu Icaintu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiya mahādevaṟkut tiruppaṇi ceytiru
kkum brā(ra)hmaṇi nākalappaiccāṉiyāṉa Āriyammaikku viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Eṇṇūr Ūrom Emmil Icain=ta vilaipporuḷ Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Oru kālāvatum Iru kālāvatum mukkālāvatum poruḷ Aṟakkoṇṭu Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutipporuṭcelavolai Āvatākavum Iṉnilam taṉ niṟai ma nilattāl van=ta Ūrpukuti Iṟaiyum Iḻicci viṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṉnilam Uḻutu Irukkum kuṭikaḷai cilliṟai ciṟucoṟumāṭṭum A
mañci veṭṭi Epperppaṭṭitum kāṭṭātākavum Innilattukku Eṅkaḷur Āṟṟu nir pāyappeṟuvatākavum Iṉnilattukku niroṭu vāykkālāṟu nirpāccik koḷḷap peṟuvatāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Eṇṇūr Ūrom Ivarkaḷ colla Ivvāvaṇam kaiyyeḻutineṉ vaṇṇakkaṉ Ammāṉ Aiyappaṉ paṟpanāpaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ coti Uṭaiyāṉ kuñciramallaṉ cuṟṟiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ilāṭai coḻamaṭipaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ va
ḷa vaṇṇakkaṉ poṉ nākkin=tiṟaiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaṇṇakkaṉ comaṭitirumeṉiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cilamaṅkalaṅkiḻāṉ tevaṉ Aṅkāṭiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ūr brāhmaṇaṉ Uttama(n)ṉ caṅkaraneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivvūr vaikānasaṉ pārattuvā[ja]ṉ caṅkaranārāyaṇaneṉ .—kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa śrī rājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatteḻāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup puḻalnāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūr nakarattom nilavi
lai Āvaṇakkaiyyeḻuttu nāṅkaḷ Āriyatecattu mekaḷāpurattu prahākarapaṭṭaṉ brāhmaṇi nākalavaiccāṉiyāṉa Āriyaammaikaḷ Eṭuppitta rājen=tiracoḻaṉmaṭattil tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyār māci makamum paṅkuṉi Uttiram Uḷḷiṭṭa tiruviḻākkaḷil Uṭaiyār tiruviḻāc cevikka van=ta śrī
na[ ntu] vāṉattil vāṟatavarkkumMay be read vantavarkkumIvvūr karmakkiḻavaṉ Aṟivākkiḻāṉ ceriyai tevamaṉaippaṭappa velikkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tiruna[ ntu] vaṉam rājaviccātiraṉ velikkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai peruvaḻikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai rājen=tiracoḻap perun=taruvil ma
nila mel nokkiya maramum kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟum vum turavum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇamum Iṟaiiḻicci Iṟaiyiliyāka Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷ Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Innila cuṭṭivaṉta veṭṭi Amañci Eccoṟu kūṟṟu nellu Uṭpaṭa kāṭṭap peṟaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
